sentence: We use personal information collected from you for the following purposes:
To deliver our products and services (including, without limitation, the Uncover Everything Mobile Application);
To provide a more personalized service;
To contact you regarding the products or services that you have requested;
To respond to any comments or queries you may have;
To carry out auditing, research and analysis in order to maintain, protect and enhance the services we provide;
To transfer your details (including account details) to relevant third parties, public bodies, industry organizations and regulators as reasonably required for the operation of our business; and
To disclose your details to government and associated organizations as required by law.

Where you have not objected to such use, we might also use your information to let you know about other products and services which we offer which may be of interest to you. If you do not object initially, but you change your mind later, please email us at: studio@uncovarstudio.com

section: H2:How do we use the data we collect?
sentence: In general, your use of our website as a site visitor is anonymous: we do not engage in any activity that will personally identify our site visitors.

section: H2:How do we use the data we collect?
sentence: We collect Personal Information (such as name, address and e-mail address for example) provided by you when you use the Uncover Everything Website and other services on the Uncover Everything Website.

section: H2:How do we use the data we collect?
sentence: In particular, we may collect information from you through the Uncover Everything Website in the following circumstances:

section: H2:How do we use the data we collect?
sentence: When you contact us by email or through the Uncover Everything Website or through the Uncover Everything mobile application with any particular comments or inquiries;

section: H2:How do we use the data we collect?
sentence: When you sign up / register on Uncover Everything website or Uncover Everything mobile application; When you sign-up to the Uncover Everything newsletter; and

section: H2:How do we use the data we collect?
sentence: When you contact us to receive details about our Uncover Everything product.

section: H2:How do we use the data we collect?
sentence: Marketing and communications data includes preferences in receiving marketing from Uncover Everything and your communications preferences. For more details about data collection through the Uncover Everything app see “Use of Uncover Everything Application through mobile device” below

section: H2:How do we use the data we collect?
sentence: We may collect additional information in connection with your participation in any promotions or competitions offered by us and information you provide when giving us feedback or completing profile forms and questionnaires. We also monitor customer traffic patterns and the use of the Uncover Everything Website, Uncover Everything mobile application which enables us to improve the service we provide.

section: H2:How do we use the data we collect?
sentence: Personal data, or personal information means any information about an individual from which that person can be identified. It does not include data where the individual identity has been removed.

section: H2:How do we use the data we collect?
sentence: Please note that while we do not explicitly collect personal information, we will treat any information held in accordance with the Data Protection Act 1998 and all applicable laws and regulations governing the protection and privacy of personal information.

section: H2:How do we use the data we collect?
sentence: You have the right to withdraw consent to marketing at any time by unsubscribing by emailing us at studio@uncovarstudio.com

section: H2:How do we use the data we collect?
sentence: We will only retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes of satisfying any legal, accounting, and/or reporting requirements.

This privacy policy (the “Privacy Policy”) explains Uncover Everything (“Uncover Everything”, “we”, “us” or “our”) policies in relation to Personal Information collected from users of the Uncover Everything Website.

We take the privacy of users of the Uncover Everything Website seriously. We will obtain, retain and process information (including your personal and sensitive data) in accordance with the applicable law. We respect your right to privacy and we understand that, as a visitor to this Uncover Everything Website you prefer to control your own personal information and preferences. [For this reason, we may ask you to register or to provide personal information and preferences when you visit certain areas of the Uncover Everything Website, Uncover Everything mobile application or request information.]

This Privacy Policy forms part of the conditions of use of the Uncover Everything Website, which can be found at www.uncovereverything.com. By using the Uncover Everything Website, the Uncover Everything mobile application and the services on the Uncover Everything Website, you consent to the collection and use of your personal data by us for the purposes authorized below and for any other purpose, which is reasonably necessary for the provision of the proper administration of our relationship with you and the Uncover Everything Website.

The Uncover Everything Website and Uncover Everything mobile application is not intended for children especially those under 13 years of age. You must be 13 years of age or older to register, or use the Uncover Everything website and/or Uncover Everything mobile application in any manner. By registering, visiting, downloading and using Uncover Everything website and/or Uncover Everything mobile application, you represent and warrant to Uncover Everything that you are 13 years of age or older, and that you have the right, authority and capacity to use the website and/or mobile application.

We reserve the right to make changes to this Privacy Policy at any time with or without prior notice by posting new terms on the Uncover Everything Website and Uncover Everything mobile application. We will only use information in accordance with the Privacy Policy under which the information was collected. If you regularly use the Uncover Everything Website you should continue to check this Privacy Policy for updates and amendments, as you will be deemed to have accepted the changes if you continue to use the Uncover Everything Website or Uncover Everything mobile application after any changes have been posted.

section: H2:How do we store and maintain personal information?
sentence: All of our employees are subject to obligations of confidentiality regarding information which they have access to in the course of their employment including the personal information of customers. All personal information is held in secure computer storage facilities and paper-based files. We take steps to protect the personal information we hold from misuse, loss, unauthorized access, modification or disclosure.

section: H2:How do we store and maintain personal information?
sentence: It may be necessary for us to maintain our records for a number of years. However, when information is no longer required, we will destroy records containing personal information securely.

As we develop our business we might buy or sell businesses or subsidiaries. Where such a transaction occurs, or in the event that we are or substantially all of our assets are acquired, the transferred assets will generally include customer information but any such transfer shall be conditional on this information remaining subject to the restrictions on its use as set out in the Privacy Policy notice pre-existing the transfer.

We may employ other companies and individuals to carry out functions on our behalf including sending mail, providing marketing assistance, analyzing data and providing customer service. In order to carry out their functions these companies and individuals may require access to your personal data but we shall only disclose such relevant personal information as is needed by them to perform their functions.

Where requested to do so, we may co-operate with any court, tribunal, regulatory body, police authority or other similar authority in any investigations or proceedings concerning you or your use of the Website. This may include disclosing information about communications transmitted via the Uncover Everything Website to such authorities where required.
We may also use and share information relating to groups of customers, without identifying individuals, to learn more about customer behavior and find ways of enhancing our service.

uncovereverything.com may collect certain information by automated means, such as cookies and web beacons, when a user visits our website. A “cookie” is a small piece of data that a website can send to your browser, which may then be stored on your system. For further information on the cookies we use on our site and why we use them.

We sometimes collect anonymous information from visits to our website to help us provide better customer service. This anonymous information is sometimes known as “click stream data”. We may use this data to analyze trends and statistics and to help us provide you with a better customer service.

We use Google Analytics cookies on our site to enable us to track visitor behavior and measure site performance. This helps us to improve the way our site works, for example, by ensuring that visitors can find what they are looking for easily.

All the data contained in our cookies is completely anonymous and does not contain any personally identifiable information. More information about Google Analytics cookies can be found at: support.google.com/analytics
We do not use flash cookies (sometimes known as local shared objects).
Most browsers allow you to turn off the cookie function. If you want to know how to do this please look at the help menu on your browser, but this may restrict the use of some parts of the Website.

The Uncover Everything Website and Uncover Everything application may contain links to other websites. Please note that we are not responsible for the privacy practices of such other websites, and we recommend you read the privacy statements immediately on entering other websites. This Privacy Policy applies only to information collected through the Uncover Everything Website and Uncover Everything mobile application.
YOUR RIGHTS

IF YOU DO NOT WISH YOUR PERSONAL DATA TO BE USED IN THE MANNER SET OUT IN THIS PRIVACY POLICY PLEASE EXIT the Uncover Everything Website and Uncover Everything mobile application IMMEDIATELY AND DO NOT USE the Uncover Everything Website or Uncover Everything mobile application IN THE

You have the right to obtain a copy of any personal information, which we hold, about you and to notify us of any inaccuracies. If you would like to obtain a copy of your personal information please write to us using the address provided in this Privacy Policy. You will need to verify your identity and specify what information you require. We may charge you a fee to cover our costs incurred in providing you with a copy of your information.

We will be happy to answer any inquiries from you regarding this Privacy Policy, the personal data we hold about you or the use we make of it. If you have any queries, comments, or if you wish to correct or update the data we hold about you, please email us at: studio@uncovarstudio.com

This Privacy Policy shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Texas, USA applicable to agreements made and to be entirely performed within the State of Texas (even if your use is outside of the State of Texas), without resort to its conflict of law provisions. You agree that any action at law or in equity arising out of or relating to this website or these terms shall be filed only in the state or federal courts located in the State of Texas and you hereby irrevocably and unconditionally consent and submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of such courts.
USE OF Uncover Everything APPLICATION THROUGH MOBILE DEVICE
This Privacy Policy applies to our collection and processing of personal data through the Uncover Everything Mobile Application.

Through the Mobile Application, we may collect mobile device identifiers, such as device type, IP address, operating system and your geographic location. If you choose to activate Facebook or Twitter on the Uncover Everything application, we may also collect your name, sex, occupation and/or any other personal information you have provided to Facebook or Twitter.
